ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "geo" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet has geographical information */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation to which the tweet belongs */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is possibly sensitive */,
  "withheld" TEXT /* Information about content withholding */,
  "reply_settings" TEXT /* Settings for who can reply to the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "retweet_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who originally retweeted the tweet (if it was retweeted) */,
  "quote_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who originally quoted the tweet (if it was quoted) */,
  "original_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet (if the tweet is a retweet or quote) */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is pinned by the author */,
  "has_media" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet contains media */,
  "media_count" INTEGER /* Number of media attachments in the tweet */,
  "is_reply_to_deleted_tweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a reply to a deleted tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, content moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Text for the user's bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Text for the user's location */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "tweets_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets the user has posted */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is private */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "last_profile_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last profile update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "context_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the annotation belongs to */,
  "domain_id" TEXT /* ID of the domain of the annotation */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the entity of the annotation */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain of the annotation */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity of the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the context annotation */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Person, Organization, Product) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_context_annotations_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the entity belongs to */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Person, Organization, Product) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start index of the entity in the tweet text */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End index of the entity in the tweet text */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the entity */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability score of the entity */,
  "entity_source" TEXT /* Source of the entity information (e.g., Twitter API, custom analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the mention belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start index of the mention in the tweet text */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End index of the mention in the tweet text */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mentioned_user_name" TEXT /* Username of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of the mention (e.g., reply, mention, tag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the hashtag belongs to */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start index of the hashtag in the tweet text */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End index of the hashtag in the tweet text */,
  "hashtag_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag in the dataset */,
  "hashtag_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the hashtag (e.g., rising, falling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* Shortened URL in the tweet */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL */,
  "display_url" TEXT /* Display URL */,
  "media_key" TEXT /* Media key if the URL is linked to media */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of the URL (e.g., link, media, external site) */,
  "url_status" TEXT /* Status of the URL (e.g., active, broken, redirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the attachment belongs to */,
  "media_keys" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of media keys */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, gif) */,
  "media_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media if it is a video or audio */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "start_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first tweet in the conversation */,
  "end_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last tweet in the conversation */,
  "conversation_type" TEXT /* Type of the conversation (e.g., thread, reply chain) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversation was created */,
  "num_replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies in the conversation */,
  "num_retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets in the conversation */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes in the conversation */,
  "num_quotes" INTEGER /* Number of quotes in the conversation */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the conversation has been moderated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "retweeted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was retweeted */,
  "retweet_type" TEXT /* Type of the retweet (e.g., normal, quote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who replied to the tweet */,
  "replied_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was posted */,
  "reply_type" TEXT /* Type of the reply (e.g., normal, quote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the tweet */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was liked */,
  "like_type" TEXT /* Type of the like (e.g., normal, super like) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being quoted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who quoted the tweet */,
  "quoted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was quoted */,
  "quote_type" TEXT /* Type of the quote (e.g., normal, retweet with comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the change belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_history_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_deletions" (
  "deletion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deletion */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that was deleted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the tweet */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was deleted */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the deletion */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the tweet */,
  "is_permanent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the deletion is permanent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deletion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_deletions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, post tweet) */,
  "activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location of the user performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow occurred */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the follow is private */,
  "is_mutual" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the follow is mutual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
